subject: A skeletal robed psychopomp figure standing in an ethereal green void, holding a coin purse and beckoning souls
description: A tall, gaunt skeletal figure in tattered, flowing dark robes stands at center of an ethereal greenish-yellow miasma. The figure's face is a bare skull, partially shadowed beneath a hood. Its bony hand extends outward, dangling or proffering a small bag or coin pouch — the ferryman's toll. Wisps of pale spectral matter and tendrils of green-gold smoke swirl around the figure, suggesting souls in transit or the threshold between worlds. The background dissolves into glowing yellow-green light streaks, giving the impression of a passage or veil between life and death. The palette is dominated by sickly chartreuse, ochre, and deep shadow tones, evoking a Greek-myth-meets-underworld aesthetic.
foreground: robed skeletal figure with extended hand holding a pouch
background: swirling green-gold ethereal mist with light streaks
